input.initialPrompt: I want to run only the tests with the Category=Integration trait in this xUnit project.

toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run only tests with the Category=Integration trait in their xUnit project. Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-52872d61be6c4c6a8742dd4dbba79105 && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-restore 2>&1 | tail -20", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait", "initial_wait": 30}

data.content:
All **5 integration tests** passed successfully. The command used was:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This filters xUnit tests using the `[Trait("Category", "Integration")]` attribute. Result: **5 passed, 0 failed, 0 skipped**.
